result.name: Improved STL Validator ASCII/Binary
result.description: Validates ASCII or binary STL meshes for closure, non-manifold edges, degeneracy, orientation consistency, normals, area, and signed volume.

result.name: Improved STL Validator ASCII/Binary CLI
result.description: Validates a single ASCII or binary STL file from the command line and prints JSON suitability results.

result.name: STL Validate CLI ASCII/Binary Single File V2
result.description: Validates a single STL file from the command line, correctly handling both ASCII and binary STL and printing JSON suitability results.

result.name: Validate STL CLI ASCII/Binary Single File
result.description: Validates a single STL file from the command line, correctly handling both ASCII and binary STL and printing JSON suitability results.

args.content:
import json, os, tempfile, subprocess, sys
from stl_validator_provided import parse_stl

cases = {}

cases['good_tetra_ascii.stl'] = '''solid tetra
facet normal 0 0 1
  outer loop
    vertex 0 0 0
    vertex 1 0 0
    vertex 0 1 0
  endloop
endfacet
facet normal 0 -1 0
  outer loop
    vertex 0 0 0
    vertex 0 0 1
    vertex 1 0 0
  endloop
endfacet
facet normal 1 1 1
  outer loop
    vertex 1 0 0
    vertex 0 0 1
    vertex 0 1 0
  endloop
endfacet
facet normal -1 0 0
  outer loop
    vertex 0 0 0
    vertex 0 1 0
    vertex 0 0 1
  endloop
endfacet
endsolid tetra
'''

cases['inconsistent_normals.stl'] = '''solid tetra
facet normal 0 0 -1
  outer loop
    vertex 0 0 0
    vertex 1 0 0
    vertex 0 1 0
  endloop
endfacet
facet normal 0 -1 0
  outer loop
    vertex 0 0 0
    vertex 0 0 1
    vertex 1 0 0
  endloop
endfacet
facet normal 1 1 1
  outer loop
    vertex 1 0 0
    vertex 0 0 1
    vertex 0 1 0
  endloop
endfacet
facet normal -1 0 0
  outer loop
    vertex 0 0 0
    vertex 0 1 0
    vertex 0 0 1
  endloop
endfacet
endsolid tetra
'''

cases['degenerate_closed_like.stl'] = '''solid deg
facet normal 0 0 1
  outer loop
    vertex 0 0 0
    vertex 1 0 0
    vertex 0 1 0
  endloop
endfacet
facet normal 0 0 -1
  outer loop
    vertex 0 0 0
    vertex 0 1 0
    vertex 1 0 0
  endloop
endfacet
endsolid deg
'''

results = {}
for name, content in cases.items():
    with open(name, 'w') as f:
        f.write(content)
    results[name] = parse_stl(name)

print(json.dumps(results, indent=2, sort_keys=True))

import json
from stl_validate_batch_cli import validate_file

for p in ['good_tetra_ascii.stl', 'inconsistent_normals.stl', 'degenerate_closed_like.stl']:
    print(json.dumps(validate_file(p), sort_keys=True))
